positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a gentle celestial whale swimming through a bioluminescent cosmic nebula. The whale should have smooth, elegant, abstract contours, rendered in deep indigo and sapphire tones, contrasting sharply against a vibrant, gradient background of emerald green and turquoise. Focus on the silhouette and the ethereal glow effect, incorporating abstract stars and swirling cosmic dust as patterns. The overall composition must be centered, highly contrasted, and suitable for screen printing on fabric. Clean lines, high contrast, dreamlike, vaporwave aesthetic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, noise, messy lines, complex background, copyright, logo, anime, photo, realistic, ugly, cropped, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy
